# Notification System Plan

## Overview
Build a notification system for the platform.

## Steps

### 1. Set up notifications
- Create notification infrastructure
- Make it scalable

### 2. Add email notifications
- Send emails when things happen
- Use a template system

### 3. Add push notifications
- Integrate with push services
- Handle mobile and web

### 4. Build notification preferences
- Let users configure their preferences
- Store preferences somewhere

### 5. Analytics
- Track notification delivery
- Build dashboards
